publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Files of Barber Conable, generated during his tenure as New York State Senator and United States Congressman. Also, a narrative account of his experiences with the World Bank.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Barber B. Conable (b.1922) graduated from Cornell University in 1942, and was a Republican congressman representing the 37th Congressional District, New York in the U.S. House of Representatives until his retirement in 1985. He served as a New York senator, 1963-1964, before being elected to the 89th Congress.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Barber Conable papers, #2794. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Files of Barber Conable, generated during his tenure as New York State Senator and United States Congressman. Typescript journals, 1968-1984. Also, a narrative account of his experiences with the World Bank.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, a videotape of a speech given by Barber Conable at the University of Mississippi on March 30, 2000.

p.extref: A copy of the printed guide is available by clicking here. This covers only a portion of the collection. (1 MB Searchable PDF)

did.unittitle: Series I. New York State Senate

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: two folders: Red Book; Manual; Index

scopecontent.p: SUNY Geneseo 1964 Yearbook; NYS Judicial Conference Annual Report, 1964; one phonograph record

scopecontent.p: Includes Agriculture, Civil Service, Education and Highways

scopecontent.p: Internal Security; Interstate & Foreign Commerce (Drugs); Judiciary, School Prayer, Merchant Marines and Fishermen; Legislation Misc., Post Office and Civil Service; Public Works; Rules; Science and Astronautics; Standards of Official Conduct; V.A.; Senate Legislation
